title: eclipta alba var. zippeliana
intro: Eclipta alba var. zippeliana, also known as Eclipta or Eclipta Prostrata, is a perennial herb native to North America, known for its medicinal and health benefits. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries to treat various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Eclipta alba var. zippeliana include reducing inflammation, promoting hair growth, and supporting liver function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Eclipta alba var. zippeliana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or oil, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
